Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Oh, right. I was absent today... Well, that's not exactly it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 10 25 25}I was thinking the same thing, but... No, it can't wait.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}How do I put this...? I suddenly just got this feeling that I'm running out of time...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}And... I felt like I had to see you. I had to talk to you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}I'm not even sure what I wanted to say to you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}So... I guess for today, I'd like to say thanks.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}But I feel like I've learned so much by spending time with you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I just... really wanted to thank you for that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}You showed me around the school and the city... I got to hang out with you and the others...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I even got to go on a trip with you... That was a lot of fun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}It's been a joy to experience and learn new things every day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Haha, that's an interesting suggestion.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I'm sure it'd be wonderful if we could play together. But maybe we'll save that for another time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}When I saw those couples in Kyoto, or when I visited you guys at the dorm...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I realized that's what it really means to build a connection with someone.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}It's that feeling of overcoming something together, and keeping each other going...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Both sides need to come to an understanding. That's how connections are built... Right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I want you to know that you're important to me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I know I said I wanted us to be friends, but... I actually want to be something more.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}I was just passing through the hall, and I heard someone playing a beautiful song on the piano.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}So I thought I'd stop by to watch the performance...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}Who was the one playing? Was it you, {f 4 1}-kun?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}Oh, I wanted ask. It might've just been my imagination, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}I thought I sensed Ryoji-kun's presence in this room...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fuuka and I left the music room[n]and returned to the dorm...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The melody Ryoji played on the[n]piano remained fresh in my mind...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}All stats of the equipped Persona have been raised by 1.[n]{f 1 1}
